item.title: Malicious security and 2-sided output for the PSI-Sum with Cardinality problem
Non-Interactive Proof Generation from Interactive Zero Knowledge Protocols
item.description:
Work:

  • Designed a modular framework for Interactive Zero Knowledge Protocols which was used to convert it to a non-interactive protocol.
  • Implemented additional features for the design to support oracles, protocol composition, etc.. and tested existing protocols like Ligero on it

An abstraction of the implementation:

item.title: Distributed RSA Modulus generation and biprimality testing
Analysis of existing Beyond Birthday Bound MAC schemes
item.description:
• Cryptanalysis techniques on Beyond Birthday-Bound Secure claimed MAC schemes such as EWCDM, etc..

• Theoretically and practically analyzed the Encrypted Wegmen-Carter MAC scheme and H-coefficients technique.

item.title: Homomorphic Encryption Schemes
item.description:
• Programming Platform: C++, Tools Involved: NTL (ZZ class mainly), HELib (BGV-SHE scheme).

• Worked on integrating the HElib-MP Library to the HEAT API by analysing differences between HElib and HElib-MP
